errors.message_template: Anchor {anchor} is stale: the hash no longer matches the paragraph content.
errors.recovery: Call docx_read {anchor, window} and retry with the fresh anchor.

errors.message_template: Malformed anchor string: {anchor}.
errors.recovery: Check the format 'P{index}#{hash}'.

errors.message_template: Anchor {anchor} not found: index out of range or table anchor missing.
errors.recovery: Call docx_outline to re-map anchors.

errors.message_template: Unknown or expired doc_id: {doc_id}.
errors.recovery: Call docx_open again.

errors.message_template: Cannot open {path}: not a valid docx or unreadable path.
errors.recovery: Check the path; the message says what the file actually is.

errors.message_template: Document exceeds configured resource caps (part count, uncompressed size, or compression ratio).
errors.recovery: Split the document, or raise the DOCXENGINE_MAX_* limits if the file is trusted.

errors.message_template: Refusing {part}: the package contains hostile content (a DTD/entity declaration or pathological XML nesting).
errors.recovery: Conformant Word documents never declare a DTD; treat this file as untrusted.

errors.message_template: Path {path} is outside the server's configured roots.
errors.recovery: Use an allowed path.

errors.message_template: Tool {tool} is not implemented in this build.
errors.recovery: this tool lands in a later phase; see ROADMAP.md

errors.message_template: {tool}: missing required argument(s): {args}.
errors.recovery: Check the tool's input_schema in spec/tools/<tool>.json.

errors.message_template: Text not found: {old}.
errors.recovery: Broaden the query; check the projection for the exact text.

errors.message_template: {old} matches {count} times without all: true.
errors.recovery: Add all: true or narrow with an anchor.

errors.message_template: Named style {style} does not exist.
errors.recovery: Call docx_style {op: "list"} to see available styles.

errors.message_template: Atomic batch aborted: an anchor failed upfront validation.
errors.recovery: Re-read the stale anchors and resubmit the batch.

errors.message_template: Concurrent write on doc_id {doc_id} (HTTP transport).
errors.recovery: Retry; edits serialize on the write lock.

errors.message_template: Package would trigger Word repair; save refused.
errors.recovery: Run docx_repair, then re-validate.

errors.message_template: docx_repair could not fix everything safely.
errors.recovery: Report the items in remaining to the user.

errors.message_template: I/O failure writing output to {path}.
errors.recovery: Check the path and permissions.

errors.message_template: No render adapter available.
errors.recovery: Rendering auto-fetches LibreOffice by default; this means it is disabled (DOCXENGINE_AUTO_FETCH_SOFFICE), unsupported on this platform, or the download failed. Set DOCXENGINE_SOFFICE to an existing soffice, or fall back to docx_convert {to: "md"}.

errors.message_template: Renderer errored on this document.
errors.recovery: See the renderer stderr summary in the response.

errors.message_template: Unknown convert target: {to}.
errors.recovery: Use md, html, pdf, or png.

errors.message_template: Data missing for required placeholders (strict mode): {placeholders}.
errors.recovery: Extend data with the listed placeholders.

errors.message_template: Malformed mustache syntax in the template at {placeholder}.
errors.recovery: Fix the offending placeholder identified in the response.
